display.purpose: Hero and page titles only. Fraunces italic 300, tight 0.92 leading.

title.purpose: Section headings, drop names, sealed-bid amounts. Fraunces italic.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, field labels, status, step names. Uppercase 0.18em.

mono.purpose: Blueprint annotations only. Champagne Deep, uppercase.

shadows.name: soft-lift
shadows.purpose: Rare lifted surface. Default is no shadow; structure comes from hairlines.

motion.name: ease-editorial
motion.purpose: Decelerating reveal cascade on page entrance (easeOutExpo). Long settle.

motion.name: ease-soft
motion.purpose: Status-dot pulse and softer state transitions.

motion.name: cog-spin
motion.purpose: Background clockwork rotation on the mechanism flow. Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Ink-filled primary action. Hover darkens (contrast up), champagne focus ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.625rem 2rem; height: 2.75rem; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.12 0.012 60); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--background), 0 0 0 4px var(--champagne); }

components.name: CTA Block
components.description: Full-width square commitment button. Uppercase label. Forms and KYC flow.
components.css: .ds-cta-block { display: block; width: 100%; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; padding: 18px 24px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-cta-block:hover { background: oklch(0.12 0.012 60); } .ds-cta-block:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--background), 0 0 0 4px var(--champagne); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Hairline border, fills to soft hairline on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.625rem 2rem; height: 2.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0.008 70); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--background), 0 0 0 4px var(--champagne); }

components.name: Underline Amount Field
components.description: Signature bid field: no box, a single rule under a large Fraunces italic value with a trailing euro. Underline turns champagne on focus.
components.html: €
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--foreground); transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-field:focus-within { border-color: oklch(0.52 0.06 70); } .ds-field-input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; font-family: var(--font-serif), 'Times New Roman', serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; font-size: 2.25rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--foreground); } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: var(--border); } .ds-field-unit { font-family: var(--font-serif), serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 1.875rem; color: var(--muted-foreground); }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Square content panel on the page. Hairline border, no shadow, no radius.
components.html:
Votre offre scellée

Votre offre reste invisible jusqu'à la révélation.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 1.75rem; } .ds-panel-label { display: block; font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-panel-body { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--ink-2); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-bar navigation link. Muted by default, ink on hover, champagne focus ring.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-2); text-decoration: none; padding: 0.25rem 0; border-radius: 4px; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--foreground); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--background), 0 0 0 4px var(--champagne); }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: Live champagne pulse marking an open drop. The only animated accent at rest.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: oklch(0.52 0.06 70); } .ds-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.52 0.06 70); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.72 0.07 80 / 0.2); animation: ds-pulse 2400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.72 0.07 80 / 0.2); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px oklch(0.72 0.07 80 / 0.06); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status-dot { animation: none; } }

components.name: Filigrane
components.description: Signature watermark dial dropped behind page headers at ~7% opacity. The maison's recurring mark. Decorative.

narrative.overview: Drop No. is a sealed-bid house for premium watches, and the interface behaves like a quiet auction room, not a marketplace. The mood is hushed authority: a maison that has nothing to prove and raises its voice for nothing. Restraint is the luxury. Vast warm off-white, a deep brown-black ink, and a champagne accent so rare it reads as gold leaf. The Fraunces italic display carries the entire emotional register; everything else recedes to let it speak. Depth comes from hairline rules and negative space, never shadows. The one flourish is the blueprint: technical line-art, annotated like a watchmaker's plan, over a slow background clockwork. Light-only and mobile-first, by doctrine.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial silence: type and whitespace, not chrome.
Champagne as gold leaf: the one accent, rationed to ≤10%.
Hairlines over shadows: structure by 1px rules.
Blueprint as signature: line-art, watermark dials, slow gears.
Warm, never clinical: every neutral tinted toward the brand hue.

rules.name: The Gold-Leaf Rule
rules.body: Champagne covers ≤10% of any screen, marking exactly one thing. If two champagne elements compete, one is wrong.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black, No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral is tinted toward the warm brand hue (chroma 0.004-0.012).

rules.name: The Italic-Voice Rule
rules.body: The display serif is always italic, always 300. Upright or bold Fraunces is prohibited; reach for size before weight.

rules.name: The No-Em-Dash Rule
rules.body: Em dashes are forbidden in user-facing copy (also --). Use commas, colons, periods, parentheses, or a middot.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Before reaching for a shadow or card, separate content with a 1px rule and space. Elevation is the exception, not the tool.

dos: Do let Fraunces italic 300 carry the hierarchy; reach for size before weight.
Do keep champagne to ≤10% of any screen, marking exactly one thing.
Do separate content with 1px hairlines and whitespace, not boxes or shadows.
Do tint every neutral toward the warm hue (chroma 0.004-0.012).
Do reveal page content in a slow decelerating cascade (cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)), disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.
Do increase contrast on hover (darken to Ink Press) and give every interactive element a champagne focus-visible ring.
Do carry the filigrane watermark onto every new screen as the maison's signature.
donts: Don't use em dashes (or --) in any user-facing copy.
Don't ship a dark mode. The maison is light-only, by doctrine.
Don't use #000 or #fff, or any untinted clinical grey.
Don't fade interactive states with opacity; shift color instead.
Don't stack identical product cards in a grid, nest cards, or use side-stripe (border-left) accents.
Don't add marketplace urgency: countdown-pressure styling, selling-fast banners, price-war energy.
Don't spend champagne twice on one screen.
